---
title: "UAV Hardware"
id: module-goals-hs
order: 50
summary: "Hardware, open source and commercial systems, application fields, low-cost systems, and low spectral resolution."
modules:
  - module-hs
materials:
  - material-hs-0
  - material-hs-1
  - material-hs-2
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment-hs
published: false
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Hardware_Software/module-goals_hs.md"
---

- Hardware: Open Source Hardware and commercial systems
- Field of application
- Focus on low cost
- Focus on low spectral resolution

## Connected Module

- [Scientific UAV Hardware](../modules/module-hs.qmd)
